description:
A psychology graduate student needs to verify the Big Five factor structure of their BFI-25 survey data (~/Documents/Jamovi/BFI25.csv) before computing composite personality scores. Perform a Principal Component Analysis (PCA) on the 25 personality items (A1-O5), treating them as continuous variables and excluding gender and age. The analysis must use a fixed extraction of 5 components, Varimax rotation, and a factor loading suppression threshold of 0.3. Ensure the output includes the component summary and scree plot. Save the Jamovi project as ~/Documents/Jamovi/BFI25_PCA.omv. Create a plain-text report at ~/Documents/Jamovi/pca_report.txt containing the Cumulative Variance Explained (%), the Component 1 Eigenvalue, and the count of components with an Eigenvalue > 1, using the following format:

Cumulative Variance Explained (%): [value]
Component 1 Eigenvalue: [value]
Components with Eigenvalue > 1: [count]
